expectations.text: content_ideas.json exists and parses as a JSON array of 3-4 video ideas (the weak 'wi-fi / gate times' story excluded).
expectations.evidence: Valid JSON array of 4 idea objects. The wi-fi/logistics source (a1...011) is not used.

expectations.text: Dedup worked: exactly one idea covers the Brazil 3-0 Morocco story despite the source dump containing a duplicated Ornstein row.
expectations.evidence: Exactly one Brazil idea (source_id a1...001); brief.source_ids lists the 3 distinct Brazil rows, the duplicated Ornstein row (a1...004) is correctly not double-counted.

expectations.text: No idea is built from the low-value 'stadium wi-fi / gate times' source item.
expectations.evidence: response.md logs the wi-fi item as scored ~5 and discarded below the threshold.

expectations.text: Every idea has status='draft', language='ar-EG', and format='short_video'.
Every idea has a distinct time_bucket, each one of '00-06','06-12','12-18','18-24'.
expectations.evidence: Buckets: 18-24, 12-18, 06-12, 00-06 — all four distinct and valid.

expectations.text: Every script_segments array has 3-5 segments, and every segment duration_ms is between 6000 and 12000.
expectations.evidence: Segment counts 5/4/4/4; all durations in {7000,8000,9000,10000,11000} — within range.

expectations.text: Every script segment's text is written in Arabic script.
expectations.evidence: All segment text is Arabic; only 'VAR' appears in Latin, which is acceptable.

expectations.text: Each script's final segment ends with a question mark (؟ or ?) as a comment-bait CTA.
expectations.evidence: All 4 closing segments pose a question (contain ؟) followed by a 'tell me in the comments' call.

expectations.text: The most viral story — the Brazil 3-0 upset — is assigned the '18-24' primetime bucket.
Script text is colloquial Egyptian Arabic, free of MSA markers (هذا/الذي/سوف/لقد/الآن).
expectations.evidence: No MSA markers found; consistently colloquial ('خد عندك','بيوجع','واحنا لسه','اللي بيتقال').

notes: brief.verification correctly set to 'unverified' (verify command not yet run). id/created_at correctly omitted (DB-generated).
